tasks.label: Lab05: Check required deliverables
args: set -e; missing=0; for f in answers/task1_answers.md src/train_wgan_cifar.py reports/task2_results.md reports/partb_submission.md; do if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then echo "MISSING: $f"; missing=1; else echo "OK: $f"; fi; done; if [ "$missing" -eq 1 ]; then echo "\nStatus: Incomplete deliverables."; exit 1; else echo "\nStatus: All required deliverables found."; fi
